{{Quote|Oh really? You mean someone like you actually has a purpose inside? Well then, what is it?|Grann, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], before entering the [[Sith Embassy]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Grann''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the ranking [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Sith Embassy]] on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in [[3956 BBY]] during the [[Raid on the Sith Embassy]].

==Equipment==
Grann possessed an [[Echani foil|Echani Foil]].

==Behind the scenes==
Grann is only referred to as such in a cutscene within ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', when the security guard at the receptionist desk sounds the alarm. Otherwise he is simply referred to as "'''Sith Diplomat'''."

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
